---
id: mqtt-unsubscribe
title: "使 MQTT 连接配置失效"
description: "调用此接口，传入指定的设备 ID，使该设备对应的 MQTT 连接配置失效。"
sidebar_label: "使 MQTT 连接配置失效"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-api/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"使 MQTT 连接配置失效"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/subscriptions/mqtt/unsubscribe"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



调用此接口，传入指定的设备 ID，使该设备对应的 MQTT 连接配置失效。


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":false,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"deviceUniqueId":{"type":"string","description":"设备唯一标识（设备 ID）。可在请求体（Body）或请求头（Header）的 `Device-Unique-Id` 字段中传递该信息。"}},"title":"MqttUnsubscribeRequest"},"examples":{"unsubscribe":{"value":{"deviceUniqueId":"device-unique-id-001"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
